---
title: Alarico Marrowfield
type: person
aliases: [alarico]
summary: Founder of Lumenforge Systems.
---

Alarico Marrowfield is the founder of Lumenforge Systems. Alarico pushed back on the proposed valuation during diligence.

---
title: Lumenforge Systems
type: company
summary: Seed-stage company. Founded by Alarico Marrowfield.
---

Lumenforge Systems is a seed-stage company. Founded by Alarico Marrowfield. The seed conversation started in 2025.

turns.text: Just wrapped the Lumenforge Systems call with Alarico Marrowfield.
Alarico prefers async updates over standing calls. Noted for next time.
Alarico is worried the Lumenforge Systems pricing model undercuts their gross margin. Real concern for the round.
Alarico said Lumenforge Systems hit their growth target a month early. Ahead of plan.
